scripts.dev: nodemon --verbose --cwd ../../../../ --watch packages/core/dist/** --watch packages/shared/dist/** --watch packages/runtime/dist/** --watch packages/demo-agents/dist/** --watch examples/v2/angular/demo-server/src/** --ext mjs,js,json,ts --delay 800ms --signal SIGTERM --exec "tsx --env-file=examples/v2/angular/demo-server/.env examples/v2/angular/demo-server/src/index.ts"
